result.overall_summary: राष्ट्रीय खाद्य सुरक्षा अधिनियम-2013 के तहत पात्र गृहस्थी के लिए सत्यापन प्रपत्र। इसमें परिवार के मुखिया और सदस्यों की जानकारी भरनी होती है।. यह फॉर्म सरकारी मदद के लिए है। नीचे बताई गई जगहों में सही जानकारी भरें। अगर कोई हिस्सा समझ न आए, आवाज़ में सुनें।

pages.document_purpose: राष्ट्रीय खाद्य सुरक्षा अधिनियम-2013 के तहत पात्र गृहस्थी के लिए सत्यापन प्रपत्र। इसमें परिवार के मुखिया और सदस्यों की जानकारी भरनी होती है।
pages.page_summary: यह फॉर्म राष्ट्रीय खाद्य सुरक्षा अधिनियम के तहत पात्र गृहस्थियों के लिए है। इसमें मुखिया और परिवार के सदस्यों की व्यक्तिगत जानकारी, निवास विवरण, बैंक खाता, आधार कार्ड, गैस कनेक्शन आदि शामिल हैं।
pages.translation: National Food Security Act-2013 Verification Form for Eligible Households (Rural)
pages.simple_explanation: यह फॉर्म उन परिवारों के लिए है जो राष्ट्रीय खाद्य सुरक्षा अधिनियम के तहत राशन कार्ड बनवाना चाहते हैं। इसमें मुखिया और परिवार के सदस्यों की जानकारी भरनी होती है।
pages.action_guide: फॉर्म भरने से पहले आधार कार्ड, बैंक पासबुक, और परिवार के सदस्यों के जन्म प्रमाण पत्र तैयार रखें। सभी जानकारी सही भरें।

warnings: गलत जानकारी भरने पर राशन कार्ड रद्द हो सकता है।
आधार कार्ड नंबर और मोबाइल नंबर सही भरें।
बैंक खाता संख्या और IFSC कोड ध्यान से लिखें।
Verification: Field '(a) बैंक का नाम' cites source 'PAN Card (Income Tax)' which was not in the retrieved guidelines.
[WARNING] (c) IFSC कोड: IFSC code must be 11 characters: 4 letters, 0, then 6 alphanumeric (e.g. SBIN0001234). Format: XXXX0XXXXXX
[WARNING] मुखिया का EPIC No.: Voter ID (EPIC) is typically 3 letters followed by 7 digits (e.g. ABC1234567). Format: ABC1234567

(c) \u0917\u094d\u0930\u093e\u092e \u092.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
(c) \u0917\u094d\u0930\u093e\u092e \u092.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u091c\u0928\u094d\u092e \u0924\u093f\u0.title: Birth Registration (MP Window)
\u091c\u0928\u094d\u092e \u0924\u093f\u0.description: Registration of birth/death is mandatory within 21 days in MP. Beyond 21 days, a late fee and additional verification from a magistrate/SDO are required.

\u0935\u0930\u094d\u0924\u092e\u093e\u09.title: Ladli Behna Yojana (MP)
\u0935\u0930\u094d\u0924\u092e\u093e\u09.description: A flagship MP government scheme providing monthly financial assistance to women aged 21-60. Key requirements include MP domicile, non-income tax payer status, and active e-KYC.

\u0936\u094d\u0930\u0940\u092e\u0924\u09.title: Ladli Laxmi Yojana (MP)
\u0936\u094d\u0930\u0940\u092e\u0924\u09.description: Educational and financial security scheme for girl children born in MP after 2006. Provides staggered payments and a final maturity amount at age 21.

\u0906\u0927\u093e\u0930 \u0938\u09020.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u0906\u0927\u093e\u0930 \u0938\u09020.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

\u092e\u094b\u092c\u093e\u0908\u0932 \u0.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u092e\u094b\u092c\u093e\u0908\u0932 \u0.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

(b) \u092c\u0948\u0902\u0915 \u0936\u093.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
(b) \u092c\u0948\u0902\u0915 \u0936\u093.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u0938\u093e\u0924.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u0938\u093e\u0924.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

(d) \u092c\u0948\u0902\u0915 \u0916\u093.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
(d) \u092c\u0948\u0902\u0915 \u0916\u093.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u0908-\u092e\u0947\u0932 \u0915\u093e \.title: Voter ID (EPIC - MP)
\u0908-\u092e\u0947\u0932 \u0915\u093e \.description: MP election identification proof. Mandatory for casting votes in State and National elections. Form 6 is used for new MP voters, and Form 8 for address changes within the state.

(b) \u092c\u093f\u0932\u094d\u0921\u093f.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
(b) \u092c\u093f\u0932\u094d\u0921\u093f.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

(b) \u0917\u094d\u0930\u093e\u092e \u091.title: Samagra ID (MP)
(b) \u0917\u094d\u0930\u093e\u092e \u091.description: Samagra ID is the most important 9-digit (individual) or 8-digit (family) ID for all Madhya Pradesh government services. It is mandatory for linking Aadhaar and accessing any state scheme.

(h) \u091c\u093f\u0932\u093e \u0915\u093.title: MP Domicile (Sthanyi Niwas)
(h) \u091c\u093f\u0932\u093e \u0915\u093.description: MP Resident Certificate is required for local job reservations and education quotas in Madhya Pradesh. In MP, a digital certificate is preferred, and the Tehsildar is the issuing authority.

(f) \u091c\u093f\u0932\u093e \u0915\u093.title: MP e-Uparjan (Farmer Reg)
(f) \u091c\u093f\u0932\u093e \u0915\u093.description: The portal for MP farmers to register for selling Rabi and Kharif crops at Minimum Support Price (MSP). Land record (Khasra) linking is mandatory.

\u0935\u0930\u094d\u0924\u092e\u093e\u09.title: MP e-Uparjan (Farmer Reg)
\u0935\u0930\u094d\u0924\u092e\u093e\u09.description: The portal for MP farmers to register for selling Rabi and Kharif crops at Minimum Support Price (MSP). Land record (Khasra) linking is mandatory.

\u0917\u0948\u0938 \u0915\u0928\u0947\u0.title: LPG Gas (Ujjwala/General)
\u0917\u0948\u0938 \u0915\u0928\u0947\u0.description: Subsidized gas connection rules. Under MP Government rules, Ladli Behna beneficiaries often get additional cylinder subsidies (approx ₹450 per refill).

\u0938\u0926\u0938\u094d\u092f \u0915\u0.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u0938\u0926\u0938\u094d\u092f \u0915\u0.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

\u092a\u0930\u093f\u0935\u093e\u0930 \u0.title: MP e-Uparjan (Farmer Reg)
\u092a\u0930\u093f\u0935\u093e\u0930 \u0.description: The portal for MP farmers to register for selling Rabi and Kharif crops at Minimum Support Price (MSP). Land record (Khasra) linking is mandatory.

(d) \u0935\u093f\u0915\u093e\u0938 \u091.title: Kanya Vivah Yojana (MP)
(d) \u0935\u093f\u0915\u093e\u0938 \u091.description: Financial aid for the marriage of daughters from poor, widowed, or divorced families in Madhya Pradesh.

\u0917\u0948\u0938 \u0915\u0928\u0947\u0.title: LPG Gas (Ujjwala/General)
\u0917\u0948\u0938 \u0915\u0928\u0947\u0.description: Subsidized gas connection rules. Under MP Government rules, Ladli Behna beneficiaries often get additional cylinder subsidies (approx ₹450 per refill).
